mapper.sql: facility_id AS facilityId, type_id AS typeId, name, description, max_capacity AS maxCapacity, open_time AS openTime, close_time AS closeTime, slot_duration AS slotDuration, is_active AS isActive, created_at AS createdAt
mapper.select: SELECT type_id AS typeId, name, description, created_at AS createdAt FROM facility_type
SELECT f.facility_id AS facilityId, f.name AS facilityName, ft.type_id AS typeId, ft.name AS typeName, f.max_capacity AS maxCapacity FROM facility f JOIN facility_type ft ON f.type_id = ft.type_id

SELECT
FROM facility f LEFT JOIN facility_type t ON f.type_id = t.type_id WHERE f.is_active = 1 AND f.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY f.type_id, f.facility_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO facility (type_id, name, description, max_capacity, open_time, close_time, slot_duration, is_active, created_at) VALUES (#{typeId}, #{name}, #{description}, #{maxCapacity}, #{openTime}, #{closeTime}, #{slotDuration}, #{active}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE facility SET type_id = #{typeId}, name = #{name}, description = #{description}, max_capacity = #{maxCapacity}, open_time = #{openTime}, close_time = #{closeTime}, slot_duration = #{slotDuration}, is_active = #{active} WHERE facility_id = #{facilityId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE facility SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE facility_id = #{facilityId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reservation WHERE facility_id = #{facilityId}
